message.content:
@startuml
participant "Member" as Member
participant ":TicketDetailPage" as TicketDetailPage
participant ":TicketDetailContainer" as TicketDetailContainer
participant ":AttendanceService (Frontend)" as AttendanceService
participant ":Router" as Router
participant ":AttendanceHTTPTransport" as AttendanceHTTPTransport
participant ":AttendanceEndpoint" as AttendanceEndpoint
participant ":AttendanceService" as AttendanceService2
participant ":RequesterService" as RequesterService
participant ":AttendanceCommand" as AttendanceCommand
participant ":AttendanceQuery" as AttendanceQuery

Member -> TicketDetailPage: Click "Yes" Button
TicketDetailPage -> TicketDetailContainer: handleConfirmation(input)
TicketDetailContainer -> AttendanceService: confirmAttendance(classId, payload)
AttendanceService -> Router: route("PATCH", "v2/class/class_id/attendance/confirmation")
Router -> AttendanceHTTPTransport: Confirmation(AttendanceService, [ServerOption])
AttendanceHTTPTransport -> AttendanceEndpoint: Confirmation(AttendanceService)
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceService2: Confirmation(context, payload)
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceEndpoint: Validate()

alt "Data Valid"
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceQuery: GetPureModel(context, [SliceCondition])
AttendanceQuery -> AttendanceService2: ticket
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceEndpoint: Register(context, [payload])
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceService2: UpdateRequestStatus(context, ticket)
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceEndpoint: is updated
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceService2: response := Response(is updated, nil)
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceHTTPTransport: response
AttendanceHTTPTransport -> AttendanceService: response
AttendanceService -> AttendanceEndpoint: response
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceQuery: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceQuery -> AttendanceService2: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceHTTPTransport: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceHTTPTransport -> AttendanceEndpoint: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceService2: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceService2 -> AttendanceQuery: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceQuery -> AttendanceService: UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceService -> AttendanceEndpoint: UnprocessableEntity
@enduml
